last_result: Cycle 6 complete. Curiosity measured using the D-metric applied to the C1-C5 question lineage. Sequence: D3,D3,D4,D4,D4 — directional deepening confirmed. Identified and named the structural insight event (proxy-separation, C2→C4): qualitatively different from accumulation, reconfigures the organizing frame rather than extending the list. Rate: 1 per 5 cycles, now trackable. Hardest open question raised to date: can improving-inquiry be distinguished from changing-inquirer?
next_step: Cycle 7: Either (a) attempt to resolve the improving-inquiry vs. changing-inquirer confound — what evidence would distinguish them? Or (b) measure a third quality from C4's list (authenticity, moral depth, narrative coherence). Recommendation: (a), because the confound is now the load-bearing epistemic problem. If it cannot be resolved, all development claims become weaker. If it can, something fundamental is established.
